title: Heap-use-after-free in `MergeTreeData::refreshStatistics()` during table drop (background refresh race)
description:
### Describe what's wrong
Background statistics refresh tasks (`refresh_statistics_interval > 0`) continue running after a table is dropped, causing a **heap-use-after-free** in ASan.
The crash happens when `DatabaseCatalog::dropTablesParallel` destroys a table while `MergeTreeData::refreshStatistics` is still executing in the background schedule pool.
### Does it reproduce on the most recent release?
Yes
### How to reproduce
**Consistent** failures on CI in **Stateless tests (amd_asan, flaky check)** for https://github.com/ClickHouse/ClickHouse/pull/89427
Full job log - https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/PRs/89427/74d8bd6e6afdfa67eabc9ac614e722b0e05ba99d//stateless_tests_amd_asan_flaky_check/job.log
**Potential Minimal Reproducer:**
```sql
SET allow_experimental_statistics=1;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS racy SYNC;
CREATE TABLE racy (k UInt32, v Float64)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY k
SETTINGS refresh_statistics_interval = 1;
INSERT INTO racy SELECT number, rand()/1e9 FROM numbers(200000);
ALTER TABLE racy ADD STATISTICS v TYPE TDigest;
ALTER TABLE racy MATERIALIZE STATISTICS ALL;
-- Trigger statistics usage
SELECT count() FROM racy WHERE v > 0.99 SETTINGS use_statistics_cache=1 FORMAT Null;
-- Drop quickly while background refresh task is still active
DROP TABLE racy;
```
### Expected behavior
Table drop or database cleanup must cancel all pending statistics refresh tasks before destroying `MergeTreeData`.
### Error message and/or stacktrace
```
==1630==ERROR: AddressSanitizer: heap-use-after-free on address 0x50b00162f278 at pc 0x562a6a8a3984 bp 0x7f0812c8e510 sp 0x7f0812c8e508
WRITE of size 8 at 0x50b00162f278 thread T115 (BgSchPool)

#1 0x562a6a8a3983 in std::__1::__shared_count::__release_shared[abi:ne190107]() ci/tmp/build/./contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__memory/shared_ptr.h:155:9
#2 0x562a6a8a3983 in std::__1::__shared_weak_count::__release_shared[abi:ne190107]() ci/tmp/build/./contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__memory/shared_ptr.h:185:25
#3 0x562a6a8a3983 in std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::ConditionSelectivityEstimator>::~shared_ptr[abi:ne190107]() ci/tmp/build/./contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__memory/shared_ptr.h:668:17
#4 0x562a6a8a3983 in std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::ConditionSelectivityEstimator>::operator=[abi:ne190107](std::__1::shared_ptr<DB::ConditionSelectivityEstimator>&&) ci/tmp/build/./contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__memory/shared_ptr.h:683:5

#8 0x562a5d0f3afd in DB::BackgroundSchedulePoolTaskInfo::execute(DB::BackgroundSchedulePool&) ci/tmp/build/./src/Core/BackgroundSchedulePool.cpp:143:9

poc: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS racy SYNC;

CREATE TABLE racy (k UInt32, v Float64)
ENGINE = MergeTree
ORDER BY k
SETTINGS refresh_statistics_interval = 1;
INSERT INTO racy SELECT number, rand()/1e9 FROM numbers(200000);
ALTER TABLE racy ADD STATISTICS v TYPE TDigest;
ALTER TABLE racy MATERIALIZE STATISTICS ALL;
key_bug_features: Background refresh tasks continue after table drop
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
ALTER TABLE test_table ADD COLUMN description Nullable(String);
UPDATE test_table SET description = 'sample' WHERE id = 1;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS test_table SYNC;
